summary: 'When Baro?' is now available on iOS! Thank you to everyone who provided feedback and bug reports for the 1.0 release! This update includes several quality-of-life improvements and bug fixes to enhance your experience
changes: Added scroll-to-top behavior when filters change on Baro and All Items screens
Added Apply button to filter menu
Added Plat to ducat ratio in the market tab
Added ducat and credit sliders to filter menu
Added voting info window to new Baro visits
Added checkmark toggle for owned items
Added separate notification toggles for Baro arrival and departure
Added a 'Support the Developer' button in the settings menu
Fixed positioning of edit/delete menu for reviews
Fixed server being out of sync with warframe servers (thank you daylight savings...)
Fixed incorrect mods appearing in Baro's inventory
